name: sesp-session-planner
description: GitHub Copilot-powered VS Code extension that helps Solution Engineers plan hackathons, labs, sessions, and challenges across Azure and GitHub product suites.

chatParticipants.name: sesp
chatParticipants.description: Plan hackathons, labs, sessions, and challenges for Azure + GitHub.

commands.name: hackathon
commands.description: Design a hackathon agenda with modules, challenges, and gatekeepers.

commands.name: challenge
commands.description: Generate a goal-oriented challenge (what-to-do) with hints.

commands.name: onboarding
commands.description: Generate prerequisite checklist and environment setup scripts.

commands.name: gatekeeper
commands.description: Generate a validation script / GitHub Action to verify completion.

commands.name: architecture
commands.description: Mix and match Azure + GitHub products into a cohesive architecture.

sesp.model.description: Model used by the GitHub Copilot SDK session.

sesp.useCopilotSdk.description: Route requests through @github/copilot-sdk (requires Copilot CLI). If false, falls back to VS Code's Language Model API.

sesp.cliPath.description: Optional path to the Copilot CLI executable. Leave empty to use the system PATH.

sesp.cliUrl.description: Optional URL of a running Copilot CLI server (e.g., localhost:4321). When set, the SDK connects to this server instead of spawning one.

sesp.enableGithubMcp.description: Connect the session to GitHub's hosted MCP server for repo/issue/PR tools.
